title: Remote Graphic Designer Jobs in E-commerce | Montreal Jobs
description: Research remote graphic designer positions in Canadian e-commerce companies. Real roles, real pay ranges, and practical advice for July 2025.

mainEntity.name: What is the average salary for a remote e-commerce graphic designer in Canada?

acceptedAnswer.text: Based on our research for 2025, mid-level remote e-commerce graphic designers in Canada earn between $60,000 and $85,000 CAD, while senior roles can reach up to $105,000 CAD depending on the company size and specific requirements like motion design or 3D.

mainEntity.name: Do Canadian e-commerce companies hire fully remote designers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, many prominent Canadian e-commerce brands like Shopify, SSENSE, Article, and Knix offer fully remote or remote-first positions for graphic designers. However, they may require you to be based in Canada for tax and payroll purposes.

mainEntity.name: What portfolio elements are crucial for e-commerce design roles?

acceptedAnswer.text: E-commerce companies look for high-conversion design elements. Your portfolio must include performance marketing creatives (social media ads, email campaigns), cohesive brand system implementation, landing page designs, and ideally, some motion graphics.

mainEntity.name: Are AI skills required for e-commerce graphic design jobs in 2025?

acceptedAnswer.text: While not always explicitly listed, proficiency with AI tools like Adobe Firefly, Midjourney, or DALL-E for rapid asset generation and variant creation is becoming a major competitive advantage in fast-paced e-commerce environments.
